{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/145201104?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ttzero25", "id": 145201104, "login": "ttzero25", "node_id": "U_kgDOCKeX0A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-65016", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "## Impact
n8n's Enterprise SSO instance-role provisioning maps a role claim asserted by the configured Identity Provider (IdP) to an n8n global role and applies it during authentication. The provisioning path did not prevent assignment of the `global:owner` role, unlike the token-exchange identity path, which explicitly rejects it. As a result, an SSO-authenticated user whose instance-role claim resolves to `global:owner` is provisioned as an instance owner, obtaining full administrative control over all workflows, credentials, users, and instance configuration.

This is a privilege-escalation issue that is exploitable only under specific conditions. It affects instances where Enterprise SSO is configured and instance-role provisioning is enabled via the `N8N_SSO_SCOPES_PROVISION_INSTANCE_ROLE` flag, which is disabled by default. Exploitation additionally requires the attacker to control the value of the instance-role claim issued by the IdP. As this claim is typically an administrator-managed attribute, exploitation generally requires control over the IdP or its claim-to-role mapping, or a permissive IdP configuration in which a lower-privileged user can influence the claim value. Deployments that do not use Enterprise SSO, or that have instance-role provisioning disabled, are not affected.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.64, 2.29.8, and 2.30.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Disable instance-role provisioning by unsetting or setting `N8N_SSO_SCOPES_PROVISION_INSTANCE_ROLE=false`.
- Audit IdP claim mappings to ensure no user-controllable attribute can supply the instance-role claim value.
- Restrict SSO access to fully trusted users only.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:04:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-65016"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T22:04:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65016", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@1.123.64", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.29.8", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n@2.30.1", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-privilege-escalation-via-sso-instance-role", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: SSO Instance-Role Provisioning Allows Privilege Escalation to Instance Owner", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:04:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-35q8-9mj6-wjmf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.64", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.64"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.30.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.30.0, < 2.30.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.29.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.29.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: SSO Instance-Role Provisioning Allows Privilege Escalation to Instance Owner
